query:
-- 添加示例用户（admin/admin123）
-- admin123 的 MD5 哈希值：0192023a7bbd73250516f069df18b500
INSERT INTO users (openId, username, password, displayName, email, role, lastSignedIn) 
VALUES ('admin-local', 'admin', '0192023a7bbd73250516f069df18b500', 'Admin User', 'admin@example.com', 'admin', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE password = '0192023a7bbd73250516f069df18b500', displayName = 'Admin User';
command:
